zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroi de Joinville III於1119年出生在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內喬維爾時，他的父親Roger de Joinville27歲，母親Aldéarde de Vignory24歲。他和Felicite von Brienne至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1188年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroi de Joinville III于1119年出生在法国德 艾斯特豪-馬內喬維爾时，他的父亲Roger de Joinville27岁，母亲Aldéarde de Vignory24岁。他和Felicite von Brienne至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1188年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroi de Joinville III was born in 1119, in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Roger de Joinville, was 27 and his mother, Aldéarde de Vignory, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Felicite von Brienne. He died about 1188, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroi de Joinville III est né en 1119, à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Roger de Joinville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aldéarde de Vignory, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Felicite von Brienne. Il est décédé environ 1188, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroi de Joinville III 1119 in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Joinville 27 und seine Mutter Aldéarde de Vignory 24. Er hatte mit Felicite von Brienne mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1188 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Trim, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi de Joinville III è nato il nel 1119 nel Joinville, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Joinville, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Aldéarde de Vignory, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Felicite von Brienne. Morì circa 1188, nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi de Joinville IIIが1119年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルで生まれた時，父Roger de Joinvilleは27歳，母Aldéarde de Vignoryは24歳であった。彼はFelicite von Brienneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1188年にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi de Joinville III(이)가 1119년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 조인빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Joinville(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Aldéarde de Vignory(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Felicite von Brienne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1188년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi de Joinville III nasceu em 1119, em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Roger de Joinville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aldéarde de Vignory, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Felicite von Brienne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1188, em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroi de Joinville III родился в 1119 г. в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Joinville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldéarde de Vignory, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Felicite von Brienne. Он умер около 1188 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroi de Joinville III nació en 1119, en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Roger de Joinville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aldéarde de Vignory, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Felicite von Brienne. Murió aproximadamente 1188, en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 70 años.
